alkylation reagent: alkylation of the reduced disulfide bridges was performed using 10 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylation of the reduced disulfide bridges was performed using 10 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: first with 500 ng r-LysC Mass Spec Grade (Promega) for 4 h at 30 °C
collision energy: normalized collision energy fixed to 27 for HCD fragmentation
enrichment method: the initiation complexes were then purified using Talon (Clontech) affinity chromatography
fragmentation method: MS scans were acquired at a resolution of 70,000 and MS/MS scans (fixed first mass 100 m/z) at a resolution of 17,500
instrument: LC-MS/MS analysis (n = 1) was performed on a Q ExactiveTM Plus Mass Spectrometer
ionization type: Electrospray ionization was operated in the positive ion mode
labeling: the data indicated that our ribosomal subunit preparations were active and amenable to further structural analysis.
